zh.Exeter, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John William Periam於1510年11月23日出生在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特時，他的父親William Periam22歲，母親Grace Blackaller20歲。他於1529年與Margaret Elizabeth Hone在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1573年9月5日在英國戴文艾可謝特享年62歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John William Periam于1510年11月23日出生在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特时，他的父亲William Periam22岁，母亲Grace Blackaller20岁。他于1529年与Margaret Elizabeth Hone在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1573年9月5日在英国戴文艾可謝特享年62岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Periam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Parham
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from any of the places in Suffolk and Sussex, named in Old English with pere ‘pear’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Compare Parm .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John William Periam was born on 23 November 1510, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Periam, was 22 and his mother, Grace Blackaller, was 20. He married Margaret Elizabeth Hone in 1529, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 5 September 1573, in Exeter, Devon, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John William Periam est né le 23 novembre 1510, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Periam, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Grace Blackaller, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Elizabeth Hone en 1529, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1573, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John William Periam am 23. November 1510 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Periam 22 und seine Mutter Grace Blackaller 20. Er hat 1529 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Elizabeth Hone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1573 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John William Periam è nato il il 23 novembre 1510 nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Periam, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Grace Blackaller, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Elizabeth Hone nel 1529, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 5 settembre 1573, nel Exeter, Devon, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John William Periamが1510年11月23日にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父William Periamは22歳，母Grace Blackallerは20歳であった。1529年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Elizabeth Honeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1573年9月5日にイギリスデボンエクセターで62歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John William Periam(이)가 1510년 11월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Periam(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Blackaller(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Elizabeth Hone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1573년 9월 5일 영국 데폰 세터에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.23 November 1510–5 September 1573: 23 de novembro de 1510–5 de setembro de 1573
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John William Periam nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1510, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Periam, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Grace Blackaller, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Elizabeth Hone em 1529, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1573, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John William Periam родился 23 ноября 1510 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Periam было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Blackaller, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Elizabeth Hone в 1529 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 5 сентября 1573 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

es.23 November 1510–5 September 1573: 23 de noviembre de 1510–5 de septiembre de 1573
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John William Periam nació el 23 de noviembre de 1510, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Periam, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Grace Blackaller, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Elizabeth Hone en 1529, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1573, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
